1999

With the internet bubble in full bloom mergefailure decides to build a website

2010

mergefailure finally relents and gets a facebook account - this they will live to regret

2011

Something happens on the internet.

2012

Foundation 3.0 is released! This version comes with Sass and is the first framework to use mixins and Sass partials.

2019

mergefailure invests in some stock images (VideoElementsFX), time to make this website beautiful !
